message:
feat(fp-frame,fp-index): add Index.name, map_series, resample extras, apply result_type, groupby rolling/resample

- fp-index: Index.name field with propagation through derived indexes, set_names/rename,
  shared_name semantics for set operations (14 new tests, 97 total)
- fp-frame: Series.map_series() using Series as mapper via IndexLabel lookup
- fp-frame: index_to_frame/index_to_series utility functions
- fp-frame: Resample.apply/apply_fn/std/var/median/prod methods
- fp-frame: DataFrame.apply_with_result_type (expand/broadcast/reduce)
- fp-frame: GroupByRolling (sum/mean/min/max/std/count/var)
- fp-frame: GroupByResample (sum/mean/count/min/max/first/last)
- 31 new tests, 1502 total workspace tests passing

Closes: bd-15o7, bd-1hsv, bd-o2ic, bd-ytzl, bd-2bxl

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
